title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Rivigo South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Rivigo South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rivigo South Asia Partners family as a Category Manager in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rivigo South Asia Partners:
Rivigo South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo South Asia Partners!
